label: 513_intermeeting period_intermeeting_staff review_foreign economies
label_human: Federal Reserve intermeeting review of foreign economies
description: The Federal Reserve reviewed the financial situation in advanced foreign economies during its intermeeting period. It noted stable inflation in most countries but concerns about growth softening, particularly in China and South America. The review also highlighted economic challenges in Greece and Portugal.
